client_request: We need a system where customers can book appointments online, receive automatic reminders before their appointment, and the admin team can manage schedules and bookings from one dashboard. It should be simple to use, mobile-friendly, and we may want reports later.

projectOverview.clientDescription: We need a system where customers can book appointments online, receive automatic reminders before their appointment, and the admin team can manage schedules and bookings from one dashboard. It should be simple to use, mobile-friendly, and we may want reports later.
projectOverview.cleanDescription: Development of a web-based system enabling customers to book appointments online and receive automated reminders. The system will also provide an administrative dashboard for efficient management of schedules and bookings by the internal team. Key considerations include user-friendliness and mobile responsiveness, with future potential for advanced reporting functionalities.
projectOverview.businessGoal: To streamline the appointment booking process for customers and centralize schedule management for administrative staff, thereby enhancing operational efficiency, reducing no-shows, and improving overall customer satisfaction.

objectives: Enable customers to easily book appointments online at their convenience.
Implement an automated reminder system to minimize appointment no-shows.
Provide administrative staff with a comprehensive, centralized dashboard for managing all schedules and bookings.
Ensure the system is intuitive for all users and fully responsive across various devices (desktop, tablet, mobile).
Establish a foundation for future reporting capabilities to support business analytics.

stakeholders.description: End-users who will book appointments online and receive reminders.
Internal staff responsible for managing schedules, appointments, and overall system configuration.
Technical personnel responsible for system maintenance, monitoring, and support (inferred).

functionalRequirements.title: Customer Online Appointment Booking
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall allow customers to view available appointment slots, select a service, choose a date and time, and confirm their booking online.
acceptance_criteria: Customers can browse and select an available appointment slot within 3 clicks.
A confirmation message is displayed to the customer immediately after a successful booking.
The system prevents double-booking of the same slot for the same resource.

functionalRequirements.title: Automated Appointment Reminders
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall automatically send appointment reminders to customers a configurable time prior to their scheduled appointment.
acceptance_criteria: Reminders are sent via email (and optionally SMS) 24 hours and/or 2 hours before an appointment.
Admin users can configure the timing and content of reminder messages.
Reminders are not sent for canceled appointments.

functionalRequirements.title: Admin Schedule Management
functionalRequirements.description: The admin team shall be able to view, add, edit, and block out specific time slots in the scheduling calendar.
acceptance_criteria: Admin users can view all scheduled appointments and available slots for a given day, week, or month.
Admin users can easily block out periods for breaks, meetings, or unavailability.
Changes made to the schedule are immediately reflected in the customer-facing booking interface.

functionalRequirements.title: Admin Booking Management Dashboard
functionalRequirements.description: The admin team shall have a centralized dashboard to view all bookings, create new bookings on behalf of customers, modify existing bookings, and cancel appointments.
acceptance_criteria: The dashboard displays a comprehensive list of all current and upcoming bookings.
Admin users can search and filter bookings by customer name, date, service, or status.
Admin users can create, edit, and cancel a booking in less than 5 steps, with appropriate notifications sent to the customer.

functionalRequirements.title: Customer Account & Booking History
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall allow customers to create accounts, log in, view their upcoming appointments, and access a history of past bookings.
acceptance_criteria: Customers can register for a new account using an email address and password.
Authenticated customers can view a list of their 'Upcoming' and 'Past' appointments.
Customers can cancel their own upcoming appointments if allowed by business rules.

functionalRequirements.title: Basic Reporting Capabilities
functionalRequirements.description: The system shall include the ability to generate basic reports on booking volume over specific periods, even if advanced reporting is a future phase.
acceptance_criteria: Admin users can generate a report showing the number of bookings per service per month.
Reports can be exported in a common format (e.g., CSV).
The reporting module does not impact the performance of core booking functions.

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Usability
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: The system shall be intuitive and easy to navigate for both customers and admin users, requiring minimal training.

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Mobile Responsiveness
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: The system's user interface shall adapt seamlessly to various screen sizes and orientations, providing a consistent experience on desktop, tablet, and mobile devices.

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Performance
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: Key system functions (e.g., loading available slots, confirming a booking, loading the admin dashboard) shall respond within 3 seconds under normal load conditions.

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Security
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: Customer data (e.g., personal information, booking details) shall be protected against unauthorized access, disclosure, modification, or destruction. User authentication shall be secure.

nonFunctionalRequirements.title: Reliability
nonFunctionalRequirements.description: The system shall maintain an uptime of at least 99.5% during operational hours (9:00 AM - 5:00 PM local time, Monday-Friday).

assumptions: Customers will have reliable internet access and valid email addresses/phone numbers for booking and reminders.
Administrative staff will have basic computer literacy and internet access to operate the dashboard.
The business has clearly defined services, durations, and available resources for booking.
Third-party integrations for email and optional SMS notifications are feasible and within budget.
The initial phase of the project will not include payment processing or complex resource dependency management.
constraints: The project must adhere to a fixed budget and a release timeline to be determined, with core functionality delivered first.
The system must comply with relevant data privacy regulations (e.g., GDPR, CCPA) if customer data is stored.
The system's design must support future expansion for additional services, resources, and reporting features without major architectural refactoring.
acceptanceCriteria: All functional requirements (FR-XXX) are implemented and successfully pass their defined acceptance criteria.
The system demonstrates consistent mobile responsiveness across common device types (iOS, Android, various screen sizes).
Admin users can manage schedules and bookings from a single dashboard efficiently, reducing manual effort by at least 20%.
Customer feedback surveys indicate a high level of satisfaction with the online booking process (e.g., 80% satisfaction rate).
The system achieves an average transaction response time of under 3 seconds for critical operations.
